title: Yopih DIY Photo Scrapbook Album 28x20.5 cm Hardcover Kraft Paper Scrap Book with 50 Sheets Memory Scrapbooking Book for Family, Holiday and Wedding Photography, Black
features: Dimension: This scrap book is 28x20.5 cm, with a total of 50 sheets (100 pages) inner pages, can hold 200 10x15 cm photos.
Various Colour Options: There are a total of 9 colours of scrapbook to choose from, and the inside of the scrapbook is the same colour as the cover to meet your colour preferences.

High Quality Pages: The pages of this scrapbook are made of durable, smooth and hard kraft paper material. Easy to write, not easy to bend. You can write, draw, add photos, stickers, etc. to design the cover and inside pages, perfect to show your DIY creativity.

Unique Design: Spiral binding turns the scrapbook pages 360 degrees for easy writing drawing and other decorating of the scrapbook. Please note that the spiral ring cannot be opened, so it is not possible to add pages or change the order of the pages.

After-sale Protection: We are confident that our photo albums will make you satisfied. But if you receive a product with quality problems, or you have any questions about our products, please contact our after-sales customer service before choosing a return, we will provide you with more after-sales service options.
description: Product Description Previous page Record of Love Make great memories with your loved ones. Freehand Creativity You can design the cover and the inner pages of the scrap book at will. Family Photobook Reminisce with your family about the good old days. Next page 1 Record of Love 2 Freehand creativity 3 Family Photobook Hard Cover The hard cover is strong enough to resist bending and protects the interior pages well. Coil Design The album can be rotated at 360 degrees, open in flat, easy to watch and paste. Thick Pages The inner pages are made of premium kraft paper which is not easy to fold. DIY Scrapbook You can design the cover and the inner pages of the scrap book at will.
